content: As of my last update in October 2023, the President of Mongolia is Ukhnaagiin Khürelsükh, who took office on June 25, 2021. Please verify with up-to-date sources to confirm if there have been any changes since then.
raw_content: As of my last update in October 2023, the President of Mongolia is Ukhnaagiin Khürelsükh, who took office on June 25, 2021. Please verify with up-to-date sources to confirm if there have been any changes since then.
